options.description: Vector tool: vectorize | qdrant | vertex-ai | vertex-ai-v2 | pageindex | divinci-pageindex | mongodb-atlas
Target compression ratio (2–20). 4 = keep 25% of tokens. Default: 4.

subcommands.name: migrate
subcommands.description:
Clone a vector index with new config and re-index all files.
Use this to change embedding model/dimension (e.g. 768d → 1536d).
Source index is left untouched.

Example:
  divinci rag targets migrate <id> \
    --embedding-model gemini-embedding-001@1536 \
    --title "Vectorize 1536d"
subcommands.summary: Clone a vector index with new config and re-index all files

options.description: New embedding model (key param for dimension change)

subcommands.name: reindex
subcommands.description: Re-queue all files in a vector index for reprocessing (in-place)
subcommands.summary: Re-queue all files in a vector index for reprocessing (in-place)

options.description: Override chunking tool for all files
Comma-separated file IDs to reindex (default: all)

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: Update retrieval settings without re-indexing files
subcommands.summary: Update retrieval settings without re-indexing files

options.description: Update model reference (note: does not re-index; use migrate for full reindex)
Switch between pageindex variants only: pageindex | divinci-pageindex (no re-indexing needed)
LLM model for PageIndex tree generation (e.g. vertex_ai/gemini-3.1-flash-lite). Applies on next reindex.
Target compression ratio (2–20). 4 = keep 25% of tokens. Default: 4.
